name: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp
tagline: Experimental release introducing DeepSeek Sparse Attention for long-context efficiency; set as the default chat/reasoner endpoint.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp (DeepSeek), released 2025-09-29 — part of the DeepSeek V3 line. Experimental release introducing DeepSeek Sparse Attention for long-context e…
overview: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek V3 line. Released 2025-09-29. General-purpose open-weight MoE line (671B/685B total, ~37B active) that introduced sparse-attention efficiency and hybrid thinking/non-thinking modes; predecessor to V4.
What's notable in this version: Experimental release introducing DeepSeek Sparse Attention for long-context efficiency; set as the default chat/reasoner endpoint.
